info.title: CheerConnect API
info.description: REST API for CheerConnect — a social network for the cheerleading community. Built with Next.js 16 App Router, PostgreSQL via Prisma ORM, and NextAuth.js for authentication.

sessionCookie.name: next-auth.session-token
sessionCookie.description: NextAuth.js JWT session cookie. Obtain by logging in via POST /api/auth/callback/credentials or OAuth flow.

nextCursor.description: Cursor for the next page of results. Null if no more results.

originalPost.description: Present when this post is a repost

cursor.name: cursor
cursor.description: Cursor for pagination. Pass the nextCursor from a previous response.

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Maximum number of items to return.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: User search, profile, and account management

tags.name: Posts
tags.description: Feed posts, likes, reposts, and edit history

tags.name: Comments
tags.description: Post comments, replies, and comment likes

tags.name: Teams
tags.description: Team CRUD, members, permissions, invites, follows, and achievements

tags.name: Settings
tags.description: User settings, password, and username management

get.description: Returns service status and timestamp. Verifies database connectivity.

post.description: Create a new user account with email, username, and password.

get.description: Search users by name, username, position, and location. Supports `mode=suggestions` for personalized suggestions (2nd-degree connections, same position, same region).

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Set to 'suggestions' for personalized user suggestions.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the user account and all associated data.

post.description: Upload a new avatar image (max 5MB). Replaces existing avatar.
Upload a new banner image (max 5MB). Replaces existing banner.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search by team name or location.

post.description: Block a user and remove any existing connections between you.

get.description: Retrieve paginated feed posts. Filter by 'following' (connections + followed teams) or 'all'. Supports text search with `q` parameter.

post.description: Create a post with text content and optional media. Supports #hashtags and @mentions in content.

teamId.description: Optional team ID to post on behalf of a team.

put.description: Edit post content. Saves previous content to edit history. Cannot edit reposts.

200.description: Post updated (or unchanged if content identical)

delete.description: Delete a post and its Cloudinary assets. Only the author can delete.

get.description: Get paginated top-level comments with up to 3 replies each. Supports sorting by 'popular' or 'recent'.

post.description: Add a comment to a post. Optionally reply to an existing comment (one level of nesting only).
Create a repost. Cannot repost own posts, reposts, or posts already reposted.
Like or unlike a comment (toggle behavior).

get.description: Get paginated replies for a top-level comment (offset-based).
Get the current user's connections filtered by status.

delete.description: The path parameter is the other user's ID (not the connection ID).

post.description: The path parameter is the sender's user ID.

get.description: Search teams by name, category, and location. Supports `mode=suggestions` for personalized team suggestions.

post.description: Creates a team and makes the current user admin with full permissions.

get.description: Returns full team details including members, recent posts, and upcoming events.

delete.description: Soft-deletes the member (marks as inactive). Cannot remove self or last admin.

post.description: Post on behalf of a team. Requires `hasPermission`.

get.description: List pending invites for a team. Requires `hasPermission`.

post.description: Invite a user to the team. Requires `hasPermission`. Granting admin/permission requires `isAdmin`.
Add an achievement to a team. Requires OWNER or ADMIN role.

get.description: Get all pending team invites for the current user.
Get all conversations for the current user, ordered by last message.

post.description: Create a new conversation or return existing one. Requires an accepted connection with the other user.

delete.description: Delete a conversation and all its messages.

get.description: Get paginated messages in chronological order (oldest first). Uses cursor-based pagination loading older messages.

post.description: Marks all unread messages from the other participant as read.

get.description: Server-Sent Events stream that polls for new messages every 3 seconds. Sends heartbeat every 15 seconds.
Get paginated notifications (excludes MESSAGE_RECEIVED type).

patch.description: Mark specific notifications or all unread notifications as read.

ids.description: Specific notification IDs to mark as read.

all.description: Set to true to mark all notifications as read.

get.description: Count of unread notifications (excludes MESSAGE_RECEIVED type).
Server-Sent Events stream that polls every 5 seconds for notification count, unread message count, and last message timestamp. Only emits when values change; sends heartbeat otherwise.

200.description: SSE stream with notification and message counts

get.description: Search upcoming events by type, text, and location. Supports `mode=suggestions` for personalized event suggestions.

patch.description: Update event details. Requires being the creator or team member with permission.

delete.description: Requires being the creator or team member with permission.

get.description: Get the current user's career history entries.
Get achievements for the current user or a specific user.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Optional user ID (defaults to current user).

get.description: Fetch paginated posts tagged with a specific hashtag.
Get notification preferences, privacy settings, and username change availability.

patch.description: Update username (30-day cooldown), notification preferences, and privacy settings.

post.description: Change the user's password. Requires current password. Not available for OAuth-only accounts.
Upload an image (max 10MB) or video (max 100MB) to Cloudinary.
Report a post, comment, or user. One report per user per content item.
